query: SELECT ca.appId, u.id as userId FROM customApps ca, users u WHERE ca.name = 'LiDAR Stats Monitor' AND u.role = 'admin' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3HixaTvZ1BE3FFg.root --database cJLhozXEame73NuZqMLXuR --execute SELECT ca.appId, u.id as userId FROM customApps ca, users u WHERE ca.name = 'LiDAR Stats Monitor' AND u.role = 'admin' LIMIT 1;
